what: POST selected folder path to /api/project to create the project record
why: Persists the project registration in the database; server creates .nori/ config folder inside the project directory

error_handling.scenario: Path does not exist or is not a directory
error_handling.action: Display error message below form fields; keep dialog open
Display error message; user can cancel or pick a different folder

decisions.reason: Register button disabled until path is non-empty
decisions.rationale: Path comes from the OS picker so it is always valid when present; no further client-side validation needed beyond the non-empty check
